meaning: n.置放者,(高尔夫球)轻击棒vi.闲荡.行为懒散,vt.混过
examples: I like to putter around in the garden.
I like a putter that looks and feels good.
The 12 - inch Masters mini - putter in the Augusta National pro shop.
The putter was cold most of the week and I really got it going today.
Adam Nelson is an Olympic shot putter who won the silver medal at the 2000 games.
